items.title: Hollander POTD George McCloud. Florida St SF was drafted 7th in 89 by IND. Struggled in IND & was out of NBA by 93 but got back as 3-point guy for DAL. 91-92 was an odd year: (a) sprained ankle while on the phone & sitting and (b) got into epic brawl where John Battle used a 2x4.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD George McCloud. Florida St SF was drafted 7th in 89 by IND. Struggled in IND & was out of NBA by 93 but got back as 3-point guy for DAL. 91-92 was an odd year: (a) sprained ankle while on the phone & sitting and (b) got into epic brawl where John Battle used a 2x4.

items.title: May 26, 1994: The Knicks defeat Indiana, 89-78, in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Finals to take a 2-0 series lead.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 26, 1994: The Knicks defeat Indiana, 89-78, in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Finals to take a 2-0 series lead.

Patrick Ewing had 32 PTS/13 REB/3 STL and Derek Harper had 18 PTS/8 AST for New York. The Pacers' Reggie Miller scored 23 PTS and Rik Smits added 22 PTS.

📺 ESPN

items.title: Over the last seven seasons (since The Bubble), the three teams that have exceeded their 3pt Shot Quality in the playoffs the most by eFG%:
items.author: Couper Moorhead
items.body_excerpt:
Over the last seven seasons (since The Bubble), the three teams that have exceeded their 3pt Shot Quality in the playoffs the most by eFG%:

1. Knicks (25-26) at +7.69%
2. Heat (22-23) at +5.23%
3. Pacers (24-25) at +4.93%

(Min 500 3pt FGA)

items.title: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.

items.title: For the fourth year in a row, the Eastern Conference champion lost in the ECF the year before:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
For the fourth year in a row, the Eastern Conference champion lost in the ECF the year before:

2026: Knicks (lost in '25 ECF)
2025: Pacers (lost in '24 ECF)
2024: Celtics (lost in '23 ECF)
2023: Heat (lost in '22 ECF)

(via UnderdogNBA)
#NBA

items.title: -Cavs had a winning record (5-4) in the 2025 playoffs but lost in the second round. They had a losing record (8-10) this year but made the Conference Finals.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
-Cavs had a winning record (5-4) in the 2025 playoffs but lost in the second round. They had a losing record (8-10) this year but made the Conference Finals.

-Knicks acquired OG Anunoby in 2023. Only the Pacers have beaten them in the playoffs since that trade.

items.title: The Knicks are the 3rd NBA team ever to win 6 straight games by double digits in the playoffs. The others: 2009 Cavaliers and 2004 Pacers.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks are the 3rd NBA team ever to win 6 straight games by double digits in the playoffs. The others: 2009 Cavaliers and 2004 Pacers.

Mike Brown was the head coach of two of those teams, and an assistant for the other.

items.title: If the Cleveland Cavaliers want a shred of hope, the Knicks are gonna be the fourth straight Eastern Conference finals loser to make the Finals the next year. They follow the Pacers, Celtics and Heat.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: If the Cleveland Cavaliers want a shred of hope, the Knicks are gonna be the fourth straight Eastern Conference finals loser to make the Finals the next year. They follow the Pacers, Celtics and Heat.

items.title: May 25, 1995: Shaquille O'Neal finishes with 39 PTS (15-21 FG)/10 REB in Orlando’s 119-114 win over Indiana in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 25, 1995: Shaquille O'Neal finishes with 39 PTS (15-21 FG)/10 REB in Orlando’s 119-114 win over Indiana in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Finals.

Dennis Scott added 25 PTS for the Magic, who took a 2-0 series lead. Reggie Miller scored a team-high 37 PTS for the Pacers.

items.title: If the Cavaliers lose in 4 or 5, they'll become the 4th conference finalist this century with a losing playoff record.
items.author: Zach Kram
items.body_excerpt:
If the Cavaliers lose in 4 or 5, they'll become the 4th conference finalist this century with a losing playoff record.

But the silver lining is what happened with the 3 previous teams:

- '24 Pacers—made the finals in '25
- '20 Nuggets—won in '23
- '03 Pistons—won in '04

items.title: For one afternoon, Siakam and Nembhard got to experience one of Indy's most cherished traditions from the center of it all.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
For one afternoon, Siakam and Nembhard got to experience one of Indy's most cherished traditions from the center of it all.

Next May, however, they hope to be watching from afar — still busy chasing a championship with the Pacers.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/pacers-sia...

Ewing finished with 28 PTS/11 REB/6 BLK and Charles Oakley had 20 PTS/13 REB in the Knicks' 100-89 win. Rik Smits had 27 PTS/10 REB for the Pacers.

items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 24, 1999: Latrell Sprewell with the steal and slam during New York's 79-66 series-clinching win over Atlanta in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

With the 4-game sweep of the Hawks, the Knicks advanced to play the Indiana Pacers in the Eastern Conference Finals.

items.title: Donovan Mitchell has been part of 4 of the WORST playoff collapses ever:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Donovan Mitchell has been part of 4 of the WORST playoff collapses ever:

2018: OKC comeback from down 25 points to beat the Jazz
2021: Clippers comeback down 25 points to beat the Jazz
2025: Pacers comeback down 20 points to beat the Cavs
2026: Knicks comeback down 22 points to beat the Cavs

#NBA

- Game 7 vs. the Pacers last year
- Game 1 vs. the Spurs
- Game 3 vs. the Spurs

items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 22, 2004: Reggie Miller's only FG of Game 1 is the game-winning three with 31.7 seconds left in Indiana's 78-74 victory over Detroit in the ECF.

The Pacers' Jermaine O'Neal had 21 PTS/14 REB/2 BLK. Richard Hamilton scored 23 PTS and Ben Wallace had 11 PTS/22 REB/5 BLK/5 AST for the Pistons.

items.title: May 22, 1975: Artis Gilmore had 28 PTS/31 REB/5 AST/3 BLK as the Kentucky Colonels won the ABA Championship in five games over Indiana.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 22, 1975: Artis Gilmore had 28 PTS/31 REB/5 AST/3 BLK as the Kentucky Colonels won the ABA Championship in five games over Indiana.

Seven Colonels players scored in double figures in their 110-105 win at Louisville's Freedom Hall. Billy Knight scored 40 PTS for the Pacers.

items.title: Hollander POTD Roger Brown. NYC star got blacklisted for bogus gambling scandal. Played in minors til ABA then starred for IND from 1967-1974. 4x all-star peaked at 23 ppg. Dominated 70 Finals. Per bio "he shouldn't even bother to show up before the playoffs." Died too young RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Roger Brown. NYC star got blacklisted for bogus gambling scandal. Played in minors til ABA then starred for IND from 1967-1974. 4x all-star peaked at 23 ppg. Dominated 70 Finals. Per bio "he shouldn't even bother to show up before the playoffs." Died too young RIP.
